_README: 2. Per chain fill: safe, bridge (deployed MagnetaBridgeOApp), and one 'routes'
eid        = the LZ endpoint id of the OTHER chain on this route
localToken = the token's address ON THIS chain
remote     = the SAME token's address on chain `eid`
IMPORTANT: set BOTH directions. On the source chain map (dstEid, srcToken ->
dstToken); on the destination chain map (srcEid, dstToken -> srcToken). The
bridge reverts every transfer for an unmapped token, so fill this before
opening bridge liquidity. LZ EIDs: 30101 ETH / 30110 ARB / 30184 BASE / 30109 POLYGON, etc.
